pages.title: About — AtlasDays

meta.name: description
meta.content: AtlasDays is built by one person who needed it to work. The story behind a private day-tracking app for visa limits, residency thresholds, and travel history.
AtlasDays is built by one person who needed it to work. The story behind a private day-tracking app for visa limits, residency thresholds, and travel history.

meta.name: twitter:description
meta.content: AtlasDays is built by one person who needed it to work. The story behind a private day-tracking app for visa limits, residency thresholds, and travel history.

pages.page_scripts:
<script src="assets/js/theme.js?v=20260714b"></script>
<script src="assets/js/navigation.js?v=20260714b"></script>
<script>
  (function() {
    function decode(parts) {
      return parts.map(function(code) {
        return String.fromCharCode(code);
      }).join('');
    }

    var local = decode([104, 101, 108, 108, 111]);
    var domain = decode([97, 116, 108, 97, 115, 100, 97, 121, 115]) + '.' + decode([97, 112, 112]);
    var addr = local + '@' + domain;
    var el = document.getElementById('about-email');
    if (el) {
      el.textContent = addr;
      el.href = 'mai' + 'lto:' + addr;
    }
  })();
</script>

pages.title: App Privacy — AtlasDays

meta.name: description
meta.content: How the AtlasDays app handles local data, Apple iCloud sync, Photos import, country-detection suggestions, notifications, and CSV/PDF import/export.

pages.page_scripts:
<script src="assets/js/theme.js?v=20260714b"></script>
<script src="assets/js/navigation.js?v=20260714b"></script>
<script>
  (function() {
    var el = document.getElementById('privacy-email');
    var u = el.getAttribute('data-email-user');
    var d = el.getAttribute('data-email-domain');
    var addr = u + '@' + d;
    el.textContent = addr;
    el.href = 'mai' + 'lto:' + addr;
  })();
</script>

meta.name: description
meta.content: Terms of Use for the AtlasDays app and related website pages, including app license, paid features, subscriptions, privacy, and support.

meta.name: twitter:description
meta.content: Terms of Use for the AtlasDays app and related website pages, including app license, paid features, subscriptions, privacy, and support.

pages.page_scripts:
<script src="assets/js/theme.js?v=20260714b"></script>
<script src="assets/js/navigation.js?v=20260714b"></script>
<script>
  (function() {
    function decode(parts) {
      return parts.map(function(code) {
        return String.fromCharCode(code);
      }).join('');
    }

    var local = decode([115, 117, 112, 112, 111, 114, 116]);
    var domain = decode([97, 116, 108, 97, 115, 100, 97, 121, 115]) + '.' + decode([97, 112, 112]);
    var addr = local + '@' + domain;
    var ids = ['terms-email', 'terms-email-contact'];
    ids.forEach(function(id) {
      var el = document.getElementById(id);
      if (!el) return;
      el.textContent = addr;
      el.href = 'mai' + 'lto:' + addr;
    });
  })();
</script>

pages.page_scripts:
<script>
    function toggleTheme() {
      var html = document.documentElement;
      var current = html.getAttribute('data-theme');
      var isDark;
      if (current) isDark = current === 'dark';
      else isDark = window.matchMedia('(prefers-color-scheme: dark)').matches;
      var next = isDark ? 'light' : 'dark';
      html.setAttribute('data-theme', next);
      localStorage.setItem('theme', next);
    }
  </script>
